descriptors: I am a deformed old bear that has lost all its fur. Azzurra treats me like her faithful dog and I serve her happily. I have retained most of my animal strength, despite the scars and the passing of time.
system.background: A massive hairless bear with skin pocked by disease. Once a normal bear, Medoro now serves Azzurra as a guardian of Villa Cilesterino's garden. Despite his grotesque appearance and advanced age, he retains much of his animal strength. Guards the garden along with 4 Marionettes. Will attack intruders on sight, charging at them with bestial fury.
system.notes: Has 4 wounds making him tougher than typical Minor NPCs. Azzurra uses him as her primary physical guardian. Can be spared or negotiated with if Azzurra intervenes.
